capabilities.name: Search authorized knowledge bases
capabilities.description: Retrieve relevant passages from knowledge bases visible to the current user.

capabilities.name: Query authorized structured business data
capabilities.description: Run the original user question through the safe Text2SQL query-plan and read-only SQL pipeline.

capabilities.name: Get document indexing status
capabilities.description: Query a document's filename, knowledge-base scope, indexing status, chunk count, and creation time by document ID.
